articles.description: Barring an unimaginable sequence of results, Old Trafford will host Champions League football again next season, but for those running the club, their most significant work is about to begin.
articles.title: Man Utd: Champions League football all but secured, yet big decisions loom

articles.description: Which players will prove key to their team’s chances in the Champions League last four? We've ranked the top 10.
articles.title: Champions League semi-finals: Ranking top 10 players who could decide ties

articles.description: Former heavyweight world champion Anthony Joshua has signed to fight Tyson Fury but will first have a warm-up fight against Kristian Prenga in Riyadh on 25 July.
articles.title: Anthony Joshua signs to fight Tyson Fury after comeback fight against Kristian Prenga in July

articles.description: BBC Sport F1 correspondent Andrew Benson answers your latest questions before the Miami Grand Prix.
articles.title: F1 Q&A: Rule changes from Miami, are cars designed to suit drivers, simulators and life as an F1 journalist

articles.description: Four-time winner John Higgins produces a sensational recovery from 8-3 and 9-4 down to defeat Ronnie O'Sullivan 13-12 in a final-frame last-16 Crucible epic.
articles.title: John Higgins recovers to beat Ronnie O'Sullivan in Crucible epic in World Championship last 16

articles.description: Beau Greaves becomes the first woman to win a PDC ranking title by defeating Michael Smith 8-7 in the Players Championship 11 final in Milton Keynes.
articles.title: Beau Greaves beats Michael Smith to become first woman to win a PDC title

articles.description: Despite boasting squads that have included the likes of Lionel Messi, Neymar and Kylian Mbappe, it is the current Paris St-Germain side that is playing the club's most impressive football.
articles.title: PSG: The tactical fluidity that makes Luis Enrique's side so impressive

articles.description: After every round of Premier League matches this season, Troy Deeney gives us his team of the week. Do you agree with his choices?
articles.title: Troy Deeney's Team of the Week: Isak, Kinsky, Maguire, Hncapie

articles.description: Former world champion Neil Robertson calls for a controversial chalk used by Ronnie O'Sullivan to be banned, saying all the other players "hate it" and that it "makes an absolute mess of the table".
articles.title: 2026 World Snooker Championship: Neil Robertson calls for ban on Ronnie O'Sullivan's Triangle Chalk

articles.description: Allyson Felix, the most decorated woman in Olympic athletics history with 11 medals, says she is planning a comeback at the age of 40.
articles.title: Allyson Felix: US great targets 2028 LA Olympic games in comeback
